query:
SELECT ms.id, ms.alunoId, ms.taskMode, ms.taskId, ms.customTaskTitle, tl.nome as task_library_name
FROM mentoring_sessions ms
LEFT JOIN task_library tl ON ms.taskId = tl.id
WHERE ms.taskMode IS NOT NULL AND ms.taskMode != 'sem_tarefa'
ORDER BY ms.id DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:

FROM mentoring_sessions ms
LEFT JOIN task_library tl ON ms.taskId = tl.id
WHERE ms.taskMode IS NOT NULL AND ms.taskMode != 'sem_tarefa'
ORDER BY ms.id DESC
LIMIT 20;
